clustered_themes: Route selection (mutual termination vs unilateral statutory route vs redundancy) determines risk profile more than drafting style.
The operational center of gravity is evidence quality, consultation records, and payroll settlement traceability.
Foreign employers often underestimate local forum variability and overestimate policy language alone.
IIT and social insurance close-out quality materially affects post-termination dispute exposure.
dedup_notes: Shifted from matrix/timeline-heavy framing to scenario switchboard narrative to avoid repetitive skeleton.
Condensed legal detail into appendix so the lead reads like a Pulse daily executive briefing.
uncertainties: Local arbitration/court practice can differ city-by-city even under common statutory text.
English translations of legal sources may not capture every nuance of Chinese originals.
Case outcomes remain fact-intensive; this article is a planning framework, not a case prediction tool.
